title: St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai
tagline: St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai — spiritual town of Maharashtra

heroImage.alt: St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai, Maharashtra

overview.short: St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai is a much-loved spiritual town in Maharashtra, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. John the Baptist Church is an abandoned and ruined church presently located within the SEEPZ Industrial Area, in Andheri, Mumbai, India. It was built by the Portuguese Jesuits in 1579 and opened to public worship on the feast of John the Baptist that year. It also had an attached graveyard.

topPlaces.name: Kopineshwar Mandir, Thane
topPlaces.description: Kopineshwar Mandir (also Kaupīnēśvar Mandir) (Marathi: कौपिनेश्वर मंदिर) is a temple dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva and is considered the patron god of Thane. The Shivalinga inside the temple is considered one of the largest in Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Masunda Lake
topPlaces.description: Masunda Lake, also known as Talavpali Lake, is a lake in Thane in the state of Maharashtra, India. The lake is home to a small island with a Shiv temple on it and also a Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Statue behind it.

topPlaces.name: Thane
topPlaces.description: Thane (Marathi: [ˈʈʰaːɳeː]; known as Thana until 1996) is a city in western India, in the state of Maharashtra. It neighbours Mumbai and is part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region.

topPlaces.name: Dadoji Kondadev Stadium
topPlaces.description: The Dadoji Konddev Stadium, sometimes called SR Bhosle Krida Sankul Stadium, is a sports stadium in Thane, Maharashtra, India. It is named after Dadoji Konddev and is currently used mostly for training.

topPlaces.name: Chandanwadi, Thane
topPlaces.description: Chandanwadi is a neighbourhood in Thane city of Maharashtra state in India. There are three lakes nearby, namely Kachrali Lake, Makhmali Lake, and Siddeshwar Lake.

topPlaces.name: Khopat, Thane
topPlaces.description: Khopat (Devnagari:खोपट) is an area located in the city of Thane, Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Panchpakhadi
topPlaces.description: Pachpakhadi पा़चपाखाडी (Marathi) is an upmarket and affluent locality of Thane city of Maharashtra state in India. Panchpakhadi is mentioned in the 15th-17th century Marathi-language text Mahikavatichi Bakhar as the location of the royal palace of the Bimb dynasty.

topPlaces.name: Korum Mall
topPlaces.description: Korum Mall is a shopping mall located in Thane city of Maharashtra state in India. It is a home to a number of branded shops.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai?
faq.a: Stays in St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. John the Baptist Church, Mumbai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kopineshwar Mandir, Thane, Masunda Lake, Thane, Dadoji Kondadev Stadium, Chandanwadi, Thane.
